results.title: PowerSync
results.description: PowerSync is a real-time data synchronization solution that enables offline-first applications by syncing data between local databases and cloud backends.

results.title: PowerSync Service
results.description: The PowerSync Service is the core backend for building local-first applications, enabling instant UI responsiveness and simplified state transfer between client-side SQLite and server-side databases like Postgres, MongoDB, or MySQL.

results.title: PowerSync Dart
results.description: PowerSync is a sync engine for building local-first apps with instantly-responsive UI/UX, syncing data between client-side SQLite and server-side databases like Postgres, MongoDB, or MySQL.

results.title: PowerSync (llmstxt)
results.description: PowerSync is a service and set of client SDKs for synchronizing backend databases with on-device SQLite databases, enabling real-time, local-first, and offline-first app experiences.

results.title: PowerSync Text Editing Demo
results.description: A demo app showcasing collaborative text editing using PowerSync SDK for Web, Tiptap, and Supabase, storing updates as ProseMirror steps with character IDs.

results.title: PowerSync JS
results.description: The monorepo for PowerSync JavaScript SDKs, providing tools for building local-first apps with seamless data synchronization between client-side SQLite and various server-side databases.

results.title: PowerSync SQLite Core
results.description: This project provides a SQLite extension used by PowerSync client SDKs to manage data synchronization and schema configuration.

results.title: TaskSync
results.description: TaskSync is an autonomous agent protocol that creates persistent agents, allowing users to manage tasks via a tasks.md file for efficient AI IDE operation and continuous task execution.

results.title: VolSync
results.description: VolSync is a Kubernetes operator for asynchronous replication of persistent volumes within or across clusters. It provides storage-independent replication, allowing diverse storage types to replicate to each other.

results.title: DiffSync
results.description: DiffSync is a Python utility library for comparing and synchronizing different datasets, acting as a translation layer between data sources and enabling structured diffs and sync operations.

results.title: Phoenix Sync
results.description: Phoenix.Sync provides real-time data synchronization for Postgres-backed Phoenix applications, enabling seamless data updates across LiveView, web, and mobile clients using ElectricSQL.

results.title: VideoSync
results.description: VideoSync is a screen sharing application that uses a server-client architecture to allow a host to share their screen with multiple clients on a LAN, focusing on keeping the clients in sync.

results.title: DOSync
results.description: DOSync is a production-grade Docker Compose orchestration tool that automates deployments across single or multi-server fleets, providing zero-downtime rolling updates, automatic rollbacks, and synchronization with container registries, ideal for teams seeking operational simplicity over Kubernetes complexity.

results.title: Volsync
results.description: VolSync asynchronously replicates Kubernetes persistent volumes between clusters using rsync or rclone, and supports backups via restic.

results.title: BrowserSync
results.description: BrowserSync is a tool that keeps multiple browsers and devices in sync while building websites, enabling live reloading and synchronized events.

results.title: Obsidian LiveSync
results.description: Obsidian LiveSync is a self-hosted synchronization plugin for Obsidian that supports CouchDB, object storage, and experimental WebRTC peer-to-peer synchronization for private note management.

results.title: NeuroSync Player
results.description: The NeuroSync Player enables real-time facial animation in Unreal Engine 5 by streaming facial blendshapes from audio input via LiveLink.

results.title: NeuroSync Real-Time API
results.description: A collection of AI model endpoints for a real-time audio-to-face animation system, sending facial blendshape animations to Unreal Engine via LiveLink from audio or text inputs.

results.title: AirSync
results.description: AirSync is DevRev’s solution for migrating and synchronizing data between DevRev and external systems, allowing users to import, export, and keep data in sync.

results.title: Sync
results.description: Sync provides cutting-edge AI video solutions, primarily focusing on lipsyncing models. Its API simplifies syncing lip movements in any video to match audio input, designed for seamless integration and scalability across various applications.

results.title: Payload Sync Plugin
results.description: A real-time sync plugin for PayloadCMS offering reactive queries and optimistic mutations for instant UI updates and cross-client synchronization.

results.title: ClaudeSync
results.description: ClaudeSync bridges your local development environment with Claude.ai projects, enabling seamless synchronization to enhance your AI-powered workflow.

results.title: Pgsync
results.description: Pgsync is a command-line tool for syncing data between Postgres databases, designed for speed, security, and flexibility, handling parallel transfers, sensitive data, and schema differences.

results.title: TubeSync
results.description: TubeSync is a personal video recorder for YouTube, synchronizing channels and playlists to local directories and updating media servers with downloaded content.

results.title: Yellow Clearing Network
results.description: A Layer-3 peer-to-peer network that uses ClearSync state channel technology to scale and facilitate trading, clearing, and settlement through off-chain transactions by enabling participants to create and fund private communication channels.

results.title: FreeFileSync
results.description: FreeFileSync is an open-source file synchronization software that compares and synchronizes folders, supporting various settings and batch jobs for efficient data management.

results.title: SpecSync
results.description: SpecSync integrates BDD scenarios with Azure DevOps Test Cases, synchronizing them and publishing test results for enhanced traceability.

results.title: Pg Ldap Sync
results.description: Pg Ldap Sync synchronizes users, groups, and their memberships from an LDAP server (like Active Directory) to PostgreSQL, issuing proper CREATE/DROP ROLE and GRANT/REVOKE commands to ensure consistent role management.

results.title: Sync Engine Web
results.description: A local-first, offline-capable web sync engine using CRDTs for consistent data synchronization across multiple devices.

results.title: WeChatSync
results.description: Wechatsync is a productivity tool for content creators that enables seamless synchronization of articles across multiple platforms, including WeChat Official Accounts, Zhihu, Weibo, and more, with features like Markdown editing and web content extraction.
